overall.description: First-person driving gameplay from Cyberpunk 2077, navigating rainy neon-lit Night City streets while following a yellow sedan. The scene features futuristic vehicle HUD elements, holographic advertisements, and cyberpunk architecture with heavy atmospheric rain and wet road reflections.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered highway underpass transitioning to open intersection

events.description: exiting covered concrete underpass into open urban intersection
Calaverita neon sign becomes visible ahead, increasing ambient orange light

agents.ego_description: navigating through curved underpass and emerging into open intersection, following a yellow vehicle ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan driving ahead, leading the way through the underpass and intersection

entered.detail: curved concrete ceiling of the highway underpass with visible support beams
large orange neon sign reading 'CALAVERITA' mounted on building facade
curved concrete road barriers lining the exit ramp from the underpass

segments.scene_description: The segment begins inside a curved concrete highway underpass with the camera vehicle following a yellow sedan. As the vehicle exits the sheltered tunnel around 3 seconds, the scene opens into a rainy urban intersection dominated by the bright orange 'CALAVERITA' neon sign visible ahead on the left.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit commercial downtown street with holographic advertisements

events.description: large holographic billboard with blue female face appears on left side of street
vehicle slows down approaching traffic light behind yellow car

agents.ego_description: cruising through commercial district, observing neon signs and holographic advertisements while maintaining distance from the yellow car ahead

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan maintaining position ahead, brake lights illuminating as it slows for traffic

entered.detail: large floating holographic advertisement displaying a blue-tinted female face with glowing elements
large red digital advertisement screen mounted on building facade
tall street lights with multiple lamps illuminating the wet reflective road surface

segments.scene_description: Driving through the open commercial district, the vehicle passes large holographic advertisements including a prominent blue-faced billboard on the left. The yellow car ahead begins slowing down around 18 seconds as it approaches a traffic light, with neon storefronts and digital billboards lining both sides of the wet street.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban intersection with traffic control and storefronts

events.description: coming to a complete stop behind yellow car at red traffic light
traffic light changes to green and vehicles begin accelerating

agents.ego_description: stopped at traffic light behind the yellow car, waiting for signal to proceed, then accelerating as light changes

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan stopped at red light with bright brake lights illuminated, then accelerates on green

entered.detail: bright yellow building facade with large illuminated windows and commercial signage
tall traffic signal pole showing red light then changing to green

segments.scene_description: The vehicle comes to a stop behind the yellow sedan at a red traffic light in the urban intersection. Around 30 seconds, the light changes to green and both vehicles accelerate forward, passing a distinctive yellow storefront facade on the right side of the street.

scene_state.functional_zone: multi-lane avenue with holographic advertisements and modern architecture

events.description: accelerating to higher speed following the yellow car through wide avenue
passing large digital billboard with animated content on left side of street

agents.ego_description: accelerating through wide city avenue, navigating around other vehicles while following the yellow car through the neon-lit corridor

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan accelerating and maintaining lead position through the avenue

entered.detail: temporary construction barriers with orange reflective strips lining the sidewalk
tall vertical digital advertisement screen displaying animated content
dark entrance to a covered underpass or tunnel ahead

segments.scene_description: Accelerating through a wide multi-lane avenue lined with modern glass buildings and construction barriers, the vehicle follows the yellow car past large vertical digital billboards. The street opens up with higher speed limits as they approach another underpass entrance visible in the distance.

scene_state.functional_zone: narrower downtown street with construction barriers approaching covered underpass

events.description: approaching covered underpass or tunnel entrance with reduced lighting ahead
navigating through narrower street section with construction barriers on right side

agents.ego_description: driving through narrower city streets with construction zones, approaching the dark entrance of a covered underpass

notable_agents.action: yellow sedan continuing ahead through the narrowing street toward the underpass

entered.detail: metal scaffolding structure with construction materials along the sidewalk
concrete wall with red and orange graffiti art
dark covered tunnel entrance with overhead highway structure

segments.scene_description: The final segment shows the vehicle navigating through narrower downtown streets with construction scaffolding and graffiti-covered walls on the right. The yellow car ahead continues toward a dark covered underpass entrance visible in the distance, with the street narrowing as they approach the tunnel-like structure.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person drive through a rainy cyberpunk metropolis, transitioning from a sheltered underpass into a neon-drenched commercial district and finally toward a dark downtown tunnel. It begins inside a curved concrete highway underpass, following a yellow sedan out into a rainy urban intersection dominated by a bright orange Calaverita neon sign. As the vehicle moves through the commercial district, the scene expands past large holographic advertisements and blue-faced billboards before slowing to a stop at a red traffic light amidst glowing storefronts. The camera then accelerates forward as the light turns green, passing a yellow facade and speeding down a wide multi-lane avenue lined with glass buildings and vertical digital displays. Finally, the environment shifts toward narrower downtown streets characterized by construction scaffolding and graffiti-covered walls as the vehicle follows the yellow car into a distant, dark underpass.
